name: reactor-coolant
description: Route charged coolant cells through reactor conduits to bring the core online — a neon arcade puzzle of cooling logic.
author: diffenderfer.games

game.title: Reactor Coolant Routing
game.description: Route charged coolant cells through the reactor's conduits — descending charge, alternating hot/cold polarity — and feed each core its element 1→13 to bring the reactor online. Drag, double-tap to route, chain deliveries for combo output.
